metadata.description: Resource ID of the Log Analytics workspace containing FinOpsInventory_CL
Show Finance vs Technical Budget Variance section.

variables.kqlSubscriptionSummary: FinOpsInventory_CL | where scope == 'subscription' or resourceGroup == '_subscription_rollup' | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) | project SubscriptionBudget=technicalBudget, AmortizedMTD=amortizedMTD, NativeCostMTD=nativeCostMTD, ForecastEOM=forecastEOM, BudgetUsed=actualPct, ForecastPct=forecastPct, Status=complianceStatus, TotalRGs=totalResourceGroups, LastEvaluated=lastEvaluated
variables.kqlCompliancePie: FinOpsInventory_CL | where resourceGroup != '_subscription_rollup' and isnotempty(resourceGroup) | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by resourceGroup | summarize Count=count() by complianceStatus | order by Count desc
variables.kqlInventoryGrid: FinOpsInventory_CL | where resourceGroup != '_subscription_rollup' and isnotempty(resourceGroup) | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by resourceGroup | extend StatusIcon=case(actualPct >= 100, '🔴', actualPct >= 80, '🟡', actualPct >= 60, '🟠', '🟢') | project ResourceGroup=resourceGroup, Budget=technicalBudget, AmortizedMTD=amortizedMTD, NativeCostMTD=nativeCostMTD, CostDelta=round(amortizedMTD - nativeCostMTD, 2), Forecast=forecastEOM, UsedPct=actualPct, ForecastPct=forecastPct, StatusIcon, Status=complianceStatus, Tier=spendTier, Owner=ownerEmail, LastEvaluated=lastEvaluated | order by UsedPct desc
variables.kqlTopSpenders: FinOpsInventory_CL | where resourceGroup != '_subscription_rollup' and isnotempty(resourceGroup) | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by resourceGroup | top 10 by amortizedMTD desc | project ResourceGroup=resourceGroup, AmortizedMTD=amortizedMTD, NativeCostMTD=nativeCostMTD, Budget=technicalBudget, UsedPct=actualPct, Status=complianceStatus
variables.kqlVarianceReport: FinOpsInventory_CL | where resourceGroup != '_subscription_rollup' and isnotempty(resourceGroup) | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by resourceGroup | where financeBudget > 0 | extend FinanceVariance = amortizedMTD - financeBudget, TechVariance = amortizedMTD - technicalBudget | project ResourceGroup=resourceGroup, FinanceBudget=financeBudget, TechBudget=technicalBudget, SpendMTD=amortizedMTD, FinanceVariance, TechVariance, Status=complianceStatus | order by FinanceVariance desc
variables.kqlBurnRate: FinOpsInventory_CL | where resourceGroup != '_subscription_rollup' and isnotempty(resourceGroup) | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by resourceGroup | where burnRateDaily > 0 | project ResourceGroup=resourceGroup, DailyBurn=round(burnRateDaily, 2), MonthlyProjection=round(burnRateDaily*30, 2), Budget=technicalBudget, DaysToExhaust=round(iff(burnRateDaily>0, (technicalBudget-amortizedMTD)/burnRateDaily, 999.0), 1) | order by DaysToExhaust asc

properties.serializedData:
[concat('{"version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"# FinOps Budget Compliance Dashboard

Real-time amortized cost tracking powered by Log Analytics. Data refreshes daily (06:00 UTC) and on-demand.

| Icon | Meaning |
|------|---------|
| 🟢 | Under 60% — on track |
| 🟠 | 60-79% — monitor |
| 🟡 | 80-99% — action needed |
| 🔴 | 100%+ — over budget |

> **AmortizedMTD** = RI/SP costs spread daily. **NativeCostMTD** = actual Azure cost blade value. **CostDelta** = difference."},"name":"title"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"', variables('kqlSubscriptionSummary'), '","size":4,"title":"Subscription Summary","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","crossComponentResources":["', parameters('workspaceResourceId'), '"],"visualization":"table"},"name":"subscription-summary"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"', variables('kqlCompliancePie'), '","size":2,"title":"Compliance Status Distribution","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","crossComponentResources":["', parameters('workspaceResourceId'), '"],"visualization":"piechart"},"name":"compliance-pie"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"', variables('kqlTopSpenders'), '","size":0,"title":"Top 10 Spenders (by Amortized MTD)","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","crossComponentResources":["', parameters('workspaceResourceId'), '"],"visualization":"barchart"},"name":"top-spenders"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"', variables('kqlInventoryGrid'), '","size":0,"title":"Full Inventory — All Resource Groups","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","crossComponentResources":["', parameters('workspaceResourceId'), '"],"visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"StatusIcon","formatter":0},{"columnMatch":"UsedPct","formatter":8,"formatOptions":{"palette":"greenRed"}},{"columnMatch":"ForecastPct","formatter":8,"formatOptions":{"palette":"greenRed"}}],"sortBy":[{"itemKey":"UsedPct","sortOrder":2}]}},"name":"inventory-grid"}', variables('varianceSection'), ',{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"', variables('kqlBurnRate'), '","size":0,"title":"Burn Rate Analysis — Days to Budget Exhaustion","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","crossComponentResources":["', parameters('workspaceResourceId'), '"],"visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"DaysToExhaust","formatter":8,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen"}}],"sortBy":[{"itemKey":"DaysToExhaust","sortOrder":1}]}},"name":"burn-rate"}],"isLocked":false}')]
